document.name: Castle Hill YMCA — Youth swim programs
document.shortDescription: Castle Hill Y (outdoor + indoor pools) runs youth aquatics and broader kids/teen classes; branch hub links swim lessons with seasonal registration windows.
document.longDescription:
The YMCA of Greater New York’s Castle Hill branch at 2 Castle Hill Avenue in the Castle Hill neighborhood of the Bronx promotes programs and classes for children, teens, and adults on its programs landing page, explicitly inviting families to sign up for swim lessons alongside other youth offerings. The branch page highlights both an outdoor pool and an indoor pool, family swim, lap swim, and other fitness amenities, and lists branch phone contact for questions.

Published branch hours on the location page include Monday–Friday 5:30 a.m.–10:00 p.m. and weekend hours in a similar range (see branch page for exact Saturday/Sunday times). The programs hub also advertises upcoming seasonal session windows (for example, Spring II programming with member and community registration dates) that rotate throughout the year.

Because lesson pricing is session- and level-specific and not summarized as a single child rate on the pages used here, families should confirm current swim-lesson fees and availability through the Y’s online registration system or by calling the branch.

Sources: https://ymcanyc.org/locations/castle-hill-ymca https://ymcanyc.org/locations/castle-hill-ymca/programs-classes
document.announcementDescription: Programs page promotes Spring II with separate member vs community registration Saturdays—confirm current season on the branch hub.
